113 AC1R AC1R_NONE_ABOVE (AC1R) None of Above ADL Patterns CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
114 AC1S AC1S_CONTACT_REL (AC1S) Daily Contact with Relatives/Close Friends CHAR 1 Customary routine: involvement patterns - daily contact with relatives/friends. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
115 AC1T AC1T_ATTEND_CHURCH (AC1T) Usually Attends
